Here is some introductory prose before the equation that is
long enough to wrap nicely across several lines.

\begin{equation}
    E = mc^2 \qquad \text{and some very long inline content that should NOT be rewrapped at all}
\end{equation}

\[
    a^2 + b^2 = c^2 \text{ this display math line is also intentionally quite long and must stay put}
\]

More trailing prose that also needs to be wrapped because it
exceeds the sixty column limit set here.
